tagline: The fully managed Microsoft SharePoint connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from SharePoint into Databricks.
what_it_does: The fully managed Microsoft SharePoint connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from SharePoint into Databricks. The Beta release supports API based pipeline creation. UI based pipeline creation is not yet supported.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: Databricks manages the OAuth app
capabilities.desc: Databricks manages the OAuth app and token refresh. No Azure app registration required. Recommended for most users. OAuth U2M…

capabilities.title: Bring your own Azure app
capabilities.desc: Bring your own Azure app registration. Use when your organization requires control over app ownership or API rate limiting.…

capabilities.title: For fully automated production pipelines
capabilities.desc: For fully automated production pipelines that run without user interaction. OAuth with manual token refresh

capabilities.title: A legacy method. Not recommended
capabilities.desc: A legacy method. Not recommended for new implementations.

key_takeaway: The fully managed Microsoft SharePoint connector in Lakeflow Connect allows you to ingest data from SharePoint into Databricks.
